name: turbolite
description: turbolite -- SQLite with compressed page groups and optional S3 cloud storage. Returns standard better-sqlite3 connections.

scripts.build-ext: cd ../.. && cargo build --release --features 'loadable-extension,cloud,zstd' --lib && cp target/release/libturbolite.dylib packages/node/turbolite.dylib 2>/dev/null || cp target/release/libturbolite.so packages/node/turbolite.so 2>/dev/null
